creditCards.name: U.S. Bank Altitude Go Visa
creditCards.signupBonus: 20,000 bonus points after spending $1,000 in first 90 days

rewardsRate.dining: 4x points on dining (up to $2,000 per quarter, then 1x)
rewardsRate.gas: 2x points at gas stations and EV charging

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 billing cycles
Two complimentary single-visit Priority Pass lounge visits per year

creditCards.name: U.S. Bank Altitude Connect Visa
creditCards.signupBonus: 30,000 bonus points after spending $2,000 in first 120 days

rewardsRate.portalTravel: 5x points on prepaid hotel and car reservations through U.S. Bank Travel Center
rewardsRate.travel: 4x points on travel category purchases (airlines, hotels, car rentals, etc.)
rewardsRate.gas: 4x points at gas stations and EV charging (up to $1,000/quarter)

benefits: 4 complimentary single-visit Priority Pass lounge visits per year

creditCards.name: U.S. Bank Cash+ Visa Signature
creditCards.signupBonus: $200 bonus after spending $1,000 in first 90 days

rewardsRate.chosenCategories: 5% cash back on two categories you choose each quarter (up to $2,000 combined per quarter)
rewardsRate.everydayCategory: 2% cash back on one everyday category you choose (gas, groceries, or restaurants)
rewardsRate.other: 1% cash back on all other purchases
rewardsRate.categoryOptions: 5% categories include: TV/internet/streaming, utilities, cell phone providers, fast food, gym/fitness, and more

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 billing cycles
Choose your own bonus categories each quarter
